text: As I stand in this bright, modern corridor, looking through the glass into a vividly designed exhibition space, I feel a quiet anticipation. The bold display labeled "R + D" draws me closer. There is an undercurrent of intellectual curiosity, as if I am on the verge of uncovering new layers of understanding. The words on the screen evoke a shared human longing for connection and meaning. In this intersection of design and inquiry, I sense the thrill of potential discovery and an invitation to contemplate the ever-evolving relationship between humans and knowledge.
